mapper.select:
/* wms-inbound-asrtWk-sql-oracle.xml - selectAsrtWk - 아소트 입고 정보 조회 */
ORDER BY UPDATEDATE DESC

/* wms-inbound-asrtWk-sql-oracle.xml - selectAsrtmasickey - 아소트 상품 조회 */ SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.IBHDKEY , A.IBDTKEY , A.ICKEY , B.ICNM , D.BARCODE , B.LCKEY , A.IBQTY AS IBQTY , A.IBQTY - A.ASRTWKQTY AS ASRTEXPCTQTY , CASE WHEN A.IBQTY > 0 THEN ROUND((A.IBQTY - A.ASRTWKQTY) / COALESCE(F.ICUNITQTY, 1),2) ELSE A.IBQTY END AS INNQTY , 'TXT_NON' AS COLOR , 'TXT_NON' AS DESIGN , 'TXT_NON' AS CHRT , B.IMGURL , 0 AS ASRTWKQTY , (SELECT MIN(PRDCTDATE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey}) AS PRDCTDATE , (SELECT MIN(EXPDATE) FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey}) AS EXPDATE , B.EXPCKYN , B.EXPCKTYPECD , F.ICUNITQTY , A.ASRTWKQTY AS TOTAL_ASRTWKQTY , ( SELECT MAX(CNTRNO) FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND IBHDKEY = A.IBHDKEY AND IBDTKEY = A.IBDTKEY ) AS CNTRNO FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND A.UOM = D.UOM AND D.USEYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.LCKEY = E.LCKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE F ON A.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = F.ICKEY AND F.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND A.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey}

/* wms-inbound-asrtWk-sql-oracle.xml - selectAsrtdtickey - 아소트 상품 조회 */ SELECT A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.IBHDKEY , A.IBDTKEY , A.ICKEY , B.ICNM , D.BARCODE , B.LCKEY , E.ARKEY , C.COLOR , C.DESIGN , C.CHRT , C.QTY , C.IMGURL , C.ASRTDTICKEY , F.ICNM AS ASRTDTICNM , 0 AS ASRTWKQTY , G.ICUNITQTY , ( SELECT MAX(CNTRNO) FROM TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND OWKEY = A.OWKEY AND IBHDKEY = A.IBHDKEY AND IBDTKEY = A.IBDTKEY ) AS CNTRNO , E.RACKNO , E.ROWNO , E.TIERNO FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT A INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ASRT C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ASRTMASICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = C.ASRTDTICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICBARCODE D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND D.UOM = 'EA' AND C.ASRTDTICKEY = D.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.LCKEY = E.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC F ON A.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND C.ASRTDTICKEY = F.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE G ON A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = G.ICKEY AND G.ICUNITTYPECD = 'INN' WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey} AND A.IBDTKEY = #{ibdtkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey}
